refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs clarifies specific functional aspects that contribute to productivity, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that sub-functions contribute to meeting or exceeding the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and assign tasks to equipment to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time for feedback and adjustment.

candidate_dps: DP1: Adaptive control algorithms for equipment operation optimization.
DP2: Task scheduling and dispatch system integrated with equipment telemetry.
DP3: Real-time productivity monitoring dashboard with alerting.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Adaptive control algorithms for equipment operation optimization.

potential_sources: Interaction between control algorithms and task scheduling
Data dependencies between monitoring and control
coupling_check.notes: DP1 is logically separable but requires well-defined interfaces with DP2 and DP3 to avoid tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate telemetry data for control optimization.
Risk that control algorithm complexity may impact real-time responsiveness.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing control and scheduling functions to reduce coupling and improve maintainability.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and embedded control systems responsible for equipment operation and control.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives sensor data and sends operational status to other modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task assignments from Teleoperation or NGHE Solution modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as control algorithms are embedded in vehicle systems; low diffusion as logic is centralized.
Lower containment; control logic diffusion risk if implemented here.
Minimal containment; not appropriate for control logic.
Moderate containment; could centralize control but may increase diffusion.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Embedding adaptive control algorithms within the Vehicle module ensures tight integration with physical equipment and minimizes diffusion of control logic.
containment_risks: Potential difficulty in updating control algorithms if tightly coupled with embedded systems.
Risk of limited flexibility if control logic is not modularized within Vehicle.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate modular software architecture within Vehicle to allow updates and isolate control logic.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (adaptive control algorithms) directly addresses the refined FR of optimizing equipment operation to meet productivity targets.

diffusion_risks: Potential diffusion if control logic is spread across Vehicle and NGHE Solution modules.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows highest containment score, supporting clear ownership and minimizing diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by monitoring vehicle operational parameters and productivity metrics during representative operations.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of control function to Vehicle module with defined interfaces to Teleoperation and NGHE Solution.

recommended_revisions: Refine modularization within Vehicle to support maintainability and updates.
Clarify interface protocols for Telemetry and Tasking to ensure robust integration.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, modularization within the Vehicle module and clearer interface definitions are needed to reduce risks and improve maintainability.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and assign tasks to equipment to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time for feedback and adjustment.

revise.why: To introduce finer modularization within the Vehicle module and clarify interface definitions to reduce diffusion and improve update flexibility.

assumptions: Telemetry data is accurate and timely.
Control algorithms can be embedded within Vehicle systems.
open_risks: Control logic diffusion if modularization is insufficient.
Update and maintenance challenges for embedded control software.
evidence_needed: Prototype implementation of control algorithms within Vehicle module.
Interface specification documents for Telemetry and Tasking.
